subject: [PATCH 06/10] NFSD: Enable return of an updated stable_how to NFS clients

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch enables the return of an updated stable_how value to NFS clients, which will be used in a subsequent patch to promote UNSTABLE WRITEs to FILE_SYNC WRITEs, reducing round trips and allowing clients to discard cached dirty data. The patch refactors nfsd_vfs_write() to return a possibly modified stable_how value without changing its behavior. It affects several files in the NFS server code, including nfs3proc.c, nfs4proc.c, nfsproc.c, vfs.c, and xdr3.h.
